frames: The agent stands upright, slightly leaning forward with bent arms raised.
It begins to fall backward, bending its knees and bringing its arms closer to its chest.
The agent continues to fall, leaning significantly backward with its legs extending forward.
Its upper body makes contact with the ground, while its legs are still partially raised.
The agent is mostly on the ground, lying on its back, with limbs starting to curl inward.
It is fully on the ground, lying on its back, with arms and legs bent towards its torso.
The agent remains on its back, with its limbs further contracted and body appearing more compact.
It is completely collapsed on the ground, with all limbs curled tightly in a fetal-like position.
